items.title: 数据读取与基础检查
goals: 使用 pandas 读取 CSV 或 DataFrame 构造模拟数据
检查缺失值与数据类型（dtypes）
输出基本统计 describe 与前 5 行
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# TODO: 1) 创建或读取一个包含 age/city/score 的数据表
# TODO: 2) 检查缺失值与数据类型
# TODO: 3) 打印 df.describe(include='all') 与 df.head()

# 示例起点：
df = pd.DataFrame({
    'age': [23, 25, np.nan, 30, 28],
    'city': ['BJ', 'SH', 'GZ', 'BJ', None],
    'score': [85, 92, 76, 88, 90],
})
print('info:')
df.info()
print('
缺失值计数:
', df.isna().sum())
print('
基本统计:
', df.describe(include='all'))
print('
head:
', df.head())

items.title: 缺失值处理与类型转换
goals: 使用 fillna 与合适策略补全缺失
将 age 转换为 int64，city 缺失值填充为 'UNK'
验证无缺失后再次输出 describe
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'age': [23, 25, np.nan, 30, 28],
    'city': ['BJ', 'SH', 'GZ', 'BJ', None],
    'score': [85, 92, 76, 90, 85]
})

# 缺失值处理rt numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'age': [23, 25, np.nan, 30, 28],
    'city': ['BJ', 'SH', 'GZ', 'BJ', None],
    'score': [85, 92, 76, 88, 90],
})
# TODO: 填充 age 的缺失值（如用中位数）并转换类型为 int64
# TODO: 填充 city 的缺失值为 'UNK'

df['age'] = df['age'].fillna(df['age'].median()).astype('int64')
df['city'] = df['city'].fillna('UNK')
print(df.dtypes)
print(df.describe(include='all'))

items.title: 分组聚合与排序
goals: 按 city 分组计算 score 的均值与计数
将结果按均值从高到低排序
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'city': ['BJ','BJ','SH','SH','GZ'],
    'score': [85,90,92,88,76]
})
# TODO: 按 city 分组计算均值与计数，并按均值排序
res = df.groupby('city')['score'].agg(['mean','count']).sort_values('mean', ascending=False)
print(res)

items.title: 合并/连接与重塑
goals: 合并两个表（merge on id）
使用 pivot_table 和 melt 完成透视与还原
items.code:
import pandas as pd

a = pd.DataFrame({'id':[1,2,3],'math':[90,80,85]})
b = pd.DataFrame({'id':[2,3,4],'eng':[88,92,75]})
# TODO: 外连接合并
merged = pd.merge(a, b, on='id', how='outer')
print('merged:
', merged)

df = pd.DataFrame({'city':['BJ','BJ','SH','SH'],'subject':['math','eng','math','eng'],'score':[90,85,88,92]})
pt = pd.pivot_table(df, index='city', columns='subject', values='score')
print('pivot:
', pt)
print('melt:
', pt.reset_index().melt('city', var_name='subject', value_name='score'))

items.title: 数据标准化与划分（NumPy）
goals: 使用 NumPy 构造数据并划分训练/测试
对训练集拟合标准化并应用到测试集
打印形状与均值/方差检查
items.code:
import numpy as np
np.random.seed(42)
X = np.random.randn(100, 4) * np.array([1.0, 5.0, 10.0, 0.5]) + np.array([0.0, 2.0, -3.0, 1.0])
y = (X[:, 0] + 0.1 * X[:, 1] > 0).astype(int)
idx = np.arange(len(X)); np.random.shuffle(idx)
train, test = idx[:80], idx[80:]
X_tr, X_te = X[train], X[test]
mu = X_tr.mean(0); sigma = X_tr.std(0) + 1e-8
X_tr_std = (X_tr - mu) / sigma
X_te_std = (X_te - mu) / sigma
print(X_tr_std.shape, X_te_std.shape)
print(np.round(X_tr_std.mean(0), 3))
print(np.round(X_tr_std.std(0), 3))

items.title: 高级索引与筛选
goals: 掌握 loc/iloc/at/iat 与布尔/查询筛选
组合多条件筛选并保持链式调用可读性
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame(np.arange(16).reshape(4,4), columns=list('ABCD'))
print(df.loc[1:3, ['A','C']])
print(df.iloc[1:3, 0:2])
print(df.query('A>=4 and C<14'))

items.title: 窗口函数与滚动统计
goals: 使用 rolling/window 计算移动均值与标准差
比较原序列与滚动统计
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

s = pd.Series(np.arange(1,11))
print('rolling mean:
', s.rolling(3).mean())
print('rolling std:
', s.rolling(3).std())

items.title: 分组 transform 标准化
goals: 按组对数值列做标准化（z-score）
合并回主表对比
items.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({'city':['BJ','BJ','SH','SH','GZ'],'score':[85,90,92,88,76]})
df['z'] = df.groupby('city')['score'].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std())
print(df)

items.title: 多表连接与去重
goals: 多表 merge，控制 how/keys
去重/重复项统计
items.code:
import pandas as pd
a = pd.DataFrame({'id':[1,2,2,3],'x':[10,20,20,30]})
b = pd.DataFrame({'id':[2,3,4],'y':[200,300,400]})
print(pd.merge(a, b, on='id', how='outer'))
print('drop_duplicates:
', a.drop_duplicates())
print('duplicated:
', a.duplicated().sum())

items.title: 时间序列重采样
goals: 构造小时级数据并按天重采样求均值
绘制或打印重采样结果
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
idx = pd.date_range('2024-01-01', periods=48, freq='H')
df = pd.DataFrame({'v': np.random.randn(48)}, index=idx)
print(df.resample('D').mean())

items.title: 异常值检测与裁剪
goals: 基于 3σ 原则或 IQR 检测异常值
裁剪或替换异常值并说明影响
items.code:
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
np.random.seed(0)
s = pd.Series(np.concatenate([np.random.randn(98), [6, -6]]))
mu, sd = s.mean(), s.std()
clipped = s.clip(lower=mu-3*sd, upper=mu+3*sd)
print('原均值:', mu, '裁剪后均值:', clipped.mean())

items.title: 类别编码
goals: 将分类特征进行 one-hot 编码或映射编码
比较不同编码方案的列数与可读性
items.code: import pandas as pd\ndf = pd.DataFrame({'city':['BJ','SH','GZ','BJ']})\nprint(pd.get_dummies(df, columns=['city']))

items.title: 特征缩放
goals: 实现基于训练集拟合的标准化/最小最大缩放
应用到验证/测试集
items.code:
import numpy as np
np.random.seed(42)
X = np.random.randn(10,3)
mu, sigma = X.mean(0), X.std(0)+1e-8
X_std = (X-mu)/sigma
print(np.round(X_std.mean(0),3), np.round(X_std.std(0),3))

items.title: 数据对齐与缺失插补
goals: 对齐两个索引不同的表
使用前向/后向填充或插值
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
idx1 = pd.date_range('2024-01-01', periods=5, freq='D')
idx2 = pd.date_range('2024-01-03', periods=5, freq='D')
a = pd.Series(range(5), index=idx1)
b = pd.Series(np.arange(10,15), index=idx2)
print(a.add(b, fill_value=0))
print(a.reindex(idx2).ffill())

items.title: 数据整形与长宽表转换
goals: 宽表转长表与还原
确保信息不丢失
items.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({'city':['BJ','SH'],'math':[90,88],'eng':[85,92]})
long = df.melt('city', var_name='subject', value_name='score')
print(long)
print(long.pivot_table(index='city', columns='subject', values='score'))

items.title: 训练集/验证集/测试集拆分
goals: 划分三部分数据（分层）
确保验证用于调参，测试用于最终评估
items.code:
import numpy as np
np.random.seed(0)
y = np.r_[np.zeros(50), np.ones(50)]
idx = np.arange(100); np.random.shuffle(idx)
tr, val, te = idx[:60], idx[60:80], idx[80:]
print('sizes:', len(tr), len(val), len(te))

items.title: 基线模型评估
goals: 实现简单阈值模型/频率模型
使用 NumPy 计算准确率/精确率/召回率/F1（无需 sklearn）
items.code:
import numpy as np

y_true = np.array([0,1,1,0,1,0,1])
y_pred = np.array([0,1,0,0,1,0,1])

acc = (y_true == y_pred).mean()
TP = np.sum((y_true==1) & (y_pred==1))
FP = np.sum((y_true==0) & (y_pred==1))
FN = np.sum((y_true==1) & (y_pred==0))
prec = TP / (TP + FP + 1e-12)
rec = TP / (TP + FN + 1e-12)
f1 = 2 * prec * rec / (prec + rec + 1e-12)

print('acc:', acc)
print('prec:', prec)
print('rec:', rec)
print('f1:', f1)

items.title: 参数搜索与记录
goals: 尝试不同超参并记录结果
整理为一张对比表
items.code:
import numpy as np
# TODO: 用循环尝试不同参数，记录得分到列表并打印对比表
results = []
for C in [0.1, 1.0, 10.0]:
    score = 0.8 + 0.01*np.log10(C)
    results.append({'C':C, 'score':score})
print(results)

items.title: 过拟合诊断
goals: 模拟训练/验证曲线
根据曲线判断是否过拟合并提出改进建议
items.code:
import numpy as np
np.random.seed(0)
train_loss = np.linspace(1.0, 0.2, 20)
val_loss = np.linspace(1.1, 0.5, 15).tolist() + [0.6,0.7,0.8,0.9,1.0]  # 模拟后期上升
print('train_loss last:', train_loss[-1], 'val_loss last:', val_loss[-1])

items.title: 报告撰写要点
goals: 结构化撰写模型报告（数据-方法-实验-结果-结论/局限）
导出为 Markdown 或 PDF
